message:
chore: infrastructure updates for QUIC tests and deprecation fixes

Cargo.toml:
- Add rcgen 0.13 dev-dependency for self-signed certificate generation
  in QUIC integration tests
- Enable env-filter feature on tracing-subscriber for test log filtering

src/lib.rs:
- Gate database module on mysql feature in addition to sqlite/postgres

benches/protocol_benchmark.rs:
- Replace deprecated repeat().take() with repeat_n() iterator

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -130,10 +130,12 @@ futures-lite = "2.6"
 conformance = { package = "asupersync-conformance", path = "conformance" }
 tempfile = "3.17"
 tracing = "0.1"
-tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
 opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.28", default-features = false, features = ["metrics", "testing"] }
 lz4_flex = "0.11"
 toml = "0.8"
+# Certificate generation for TLS/QUIC tests
+rcgen = "0.13"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "phase0_baseline"
